name: DeFi Development Corp.
summary: . OVERVIEW DeFi Development Corp. ("we," "our," "DeFi Dev," "us," or the "Company") is a publicly traded company focused on building and managing a digital asset treasury strategy centered on the Solana blockchain ecosystem. We also provide an artificial intelligence (AI) platform that connects commercial mortgage and small business borrowers looking for debt to refinance, build, or buy commercial property, including apartment buildings, to commercial property lenders.
